body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Adds momentum mass flux and vertical diffusion for diagnostic edmf. As the strain rate is represented in Cartesian coordinates, for a first pass we first calculate vertical diffusion in Cartesian coordinates, then transform it to a covariant vector. We then calculate vertical diffusion again with diffusivity 0 in the interior to apply the momentum flux at the surface, as the boundary condition is saved as a covariant vector.

If this looks correct, I can add them to the prognostic edmf too. I plan to keep the vertical diffusion without edmf the same, as that is just an idealized scheme and won't be used once edmf is ready.

Closes #1859 

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->

<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
